title: Solana Institute CEO says CLARITY Act must shield open-source developers
summary: Kristin Smith urged the Senate to preserve developer protections in the CLARITY Act, arguing open-source builders should not be regulated as financial intermediaries.

title: Bitcoin may act as a ‘canary in the coal mine’ as risk-off pressure spreads: Bitwise
summary: Bitwise research suggests that Bitcoin is leading a broader risk-off move across markets as global liquidity and stablecoin reserves remain elevated.

title: LA Stadium Workers Avert Strike Before First World Cup Game
summary: Workers at SoFi Stadium near Los Angeles reached a tentative agreement with management, averting the threat of a strike days before hosting the US team’s first World Cup football match.

title: EU Orders Meta to Open WhatsApp to Rival AI Chatbots—Meta Calls It 'Regulatory Overreach'
summary: The European Commission has issued interim measures forcing Meta to restore third-party AI access to the WhatsApp Business API within five days.

title: Seattle-Area Man Gets Prison for Laundering Foreign Fraud Funds With Bitcoin, Ethereum
summary: The fraudster took in nearly $100 million from victims before laundering funds via Bitcoin, Ethereum, and stablecoins.
